title: The Real Difference Between Your Choices for Solutions When PayPal and Stripe Ban Your Account — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: In Nigeria, Ghana, Pakistan, and many other countries, PayPal and Stripe have banned digital creators from using their services, citing regulatory requirements or high-risk transactions. This has left many creators wondering how to sell their digital products, courses, and art without losing access to their hard-earned money. The restrictions imposed by these payment giants have become a major hurdle for creators who rely on global sales to make a living. But there is a solution, and it's not the traditional route.
What Each Option Actually Offers

When it comes to PayPal and Stripe, what creators actually get is a heavily restricted account with strict terms, high fees, and limited access to funds. In contrast, Unchained Commerce offers a full-stack digital product store solution that integrates with NOWPayments, a payment processor with 300+ coins, no KYC, and no buyer account required. This means creators can sell their products without worrying about account bans or restrictions.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

PayPal and Stripe explicitly state that they don't support transactions in certain countries, while Unchained Commerce welcomes creators from restricted countries and provides a seamless payment experience. The platform's infrastructure is designed to bypass the limitations imposed by traditional payment processors, ensuring that creators can sell their products without any hassle. By using Web3 Wallet Connect, creators can integrate multi-chain QR codes and live price feeds, making it easy for buyers to pay in their preferred cryptocurrencies.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

The crypto payment alternative is not a workaround — it is a structurally different approach to commerce. NOWPayments operates as a crypto payment processor that requires no KYC from merchants and no account creation from buyers. It supports over 300 coins including Bitcoin, Ethereum, USDT on multiple chains, Solana, and Tron. Transactions settle directly to a wallet you control. There is no platform holding period, no payout schedule, and no compliance department deciding whether your country is permitted to receive funds. The Core Shop Engine integrates with NOWPayments via webhook, which means every confirmed transaction automatically triggers delivery — no manual steps, no delays, no dependency on a platform that can suspend your access.
PayPal and Stripe's restrictions are not just limited to certain countries, but also to specific types of transactions and products.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

The risk of platform dependency is asymmetric in a specific way that most creators underestimate. When PayPal or Stripe is working, everything seems fine. When it stops working — through suspension, policy change, or geographic restriction enforcement — you lose access to your revenue channel instantly, often with funds already inside the platform that you cannot withdraw. Rebuilding on a new platform takes weeks. The income gap during that period is real money lost. Crypto-native infrastructure removes this asymmetric risk. Your wallet cannot be suspended. Your GitHub Pages store cannot be taken down by a payment platform's compliance team. The infrastructure is under your control from day one, which means no single external decision can cut off your income.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

When choosing between PayPal, Stripe, and Unchained Commerce, consider the restrictions imposed by traditional payment processors and the limitations of their services. If you're a creator from a restricted country, Unchained Commerce is the clear choice, offering a seamless payment experience and automated delivery capabilities. With Web3 Wallet Connect, you can integrate multi-chain QR codes and live price feeds, making it easy for buyers to pay in their preferred cryptocurrencies.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

The direct answer is NOWPayments combined with the Core Shop Engine. NOWPayments is a crypto payment processor that requires no KYC from merchants and no account creation from buyers. It supports over 300 coins and sends a webhook to your backend when a payment confirms on-chain. The Core Shop Engine receives that webhook, verifies the transaction, generates a receipt, and delivers the product automatically. The key difference between this and a platform workaround is that it is not a workaround — it is a different infrastructure layer entirely. There is no platform that can suspend your access, no compliance team that can flag your account, and no payout schedule that delays your revenue. Your funds go directly to a wallet you control the moment a transaction confirms.
Unchained Commerce's automated delivery capabilities ensure that buyers receive their products instantly, without any hassle or delays.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you're a creator from Nigeria, Ghana, Pakistan, or another restricted country looking for a PayPal alternative, consider Unchained Commerce's Web3 Wallet Connect, a frontend wallet integration with multi-chain QR generation and live price feeds. For more information, visit https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html
Your Action Checklist

To start selling digital products without PayPal or Stripe, follow these steps: Set up an Unchained Commerce account and choose the Full Stack Bundle for instant access to the Core Shop Engine, Web3 Wallet Connect, and Admin Dashboard. Integrate NOWPayments for seamless payment processing and automated delivery. Configure your store with multi-chain QR codes and live price feeds using Web3 Wallet Connect. Test your store and ensure that it's working as expected. Launch your store and start selling your digital products.
With Web3 Wallet Connect, creators can integrate multi-chain QR codes and live price feeds, making it easy for buyers to pay in their preferred cryptocurrencies.
